Curio Archive

Structured historical encyclopedia for Curio Cards (2017 Ethereum NFT series).

Home Cards Artists Timeline Provenance Index On This Day Archive About / Methodology Search

Timeline

Timeline Method

Events are sorted oldest to newest by available date fields from data/events.json.

YearMonthEvent TitleDescriptionImpact Assessment
2017 May Collection launch documented Project documentation records the Curio Cards launch in May 2017. This date is used as the starting point in archive chronology. Provides the baseline date for historical ordering of subsequent Curio events.
2017 June Card 17b misprint publication Project documentation lists the publication timestamp for the 17b duplicate deployment. The event is retained as a distinct entry in collection records. Introduces a documented variant event reflected in card and contract references.
2021 October Institutional auction record published Christie's published lot records include a Curio Cards full-set sale context. Archive timelines use the published auction date as a dated institutional reference. Adds externally published institutional documentation to the event record.

Generated: 2026-02-14T17:10:16.165Z

Page Updated: 2026-02-14

Publication standard: factual summary, no speculative inference.
